data.name: Devotion to Dreadmaw
data.oracle_text:
Permanents each can give up to seven devotion to Dreadmaw (Each Aspect of Dreadmaw among permanents you control counts for one devotion to Dreadmaw).
Aspects of Dreadmaw are:
1) Mana Value 6
2) Dreadmaw appears in the art
3) Is a Dinosaur
4) Has Trample
5) Base power 6
6) Base power 7
7) Has exactly {G}{G} nongeneric mana in its cost ({G}{G}{G}, {R}{G}{G}, and {C}{G}{G} don't count, but {G}{G}, {1}{G}{G}, and {7}{G}{G} do.)
data.rulings: Each permanent is counted separately and contributes separately to your devotion to Dreadmaw. For example, if you control a Dinosaur with mana cost {2}{G}{G} and another Dinosaur with trample and cost {1}{R}, then your devotion to Dreadmaw is four.\nIf a card has multiple printings with different arts, use the printing with the least dreadmaw.

data.name: Undercity
data.oracle_text:
You can't enter this dungeon unless you "venture into undercity"
Team Spirit — All creatures controlled by target player and his or her teammates get +1/+1 until end of turn.(Leads to: Mise, Number Crunch)
Mise — Name a nonland card, then reveal the top card of your library. If that card is the named card, draw three cards.(Leads to: Hammer Helper, Sundering Fork)
Number Crunch — Return target permanent to its owner's hand.(Leads to: Sundering Fork, Stegosaurus)
Hammer Helper — Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature and roll a six-sided die. Until end of turn, it gains haste and gets +X/+0, where X is the result.(Leads to: Saw in Half)
Sundering Fork — Destroy target artifact.(Leads to: Saw in Half, Pair o' Dice Lost)
Stegosaurus — Roll a six-sided die. This dungeon deals equal to the result to target creature an opponent controls.(Leads to: Pair o' Dice Lost)
Saw in Half — Destroy target creature. If that creature dies this way, its controller creates two tokens that are copies of that creature, except their base power is half that creature's power and their base toughness is half that creature's toughness. Round up each time.(Leads to: Throne of the Dead Memes)
Pair o' Dice Lost — Roll two six-sided dice. Return any number of cards with total mana value X or less from your graveyard to your hand where X is the total of those results.(Leads to: Throne of the Dead Memes)
Throne of the Dead Memes — Create Colossal Dreadmaw and Storm Crow, a 7/8 legendary Dinosaur Bird creature with flying and trample.

data.oracle_text:
Crash Landing — Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Leads to: Goblin Camp, Emerald Grove, Auntie's Teahouse)
Goblin Camp — Create a Treasure token. (Leads to: Defiled Temple)
Emerald Grove — Create a 2/2 white Knight creature token. (Leads to: Defiled Temple, Mountain Pass)
Auntie's Teahouse — Scry 3. (Leads to: Mountain Pass)
Defiled Temple — You may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, draw a card. (Leads to: Ebonlake Grotto, Grymforge)
Mountain Pass — You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. (Leads to: Grymforge, Githyanki Crèche)
Ebonlake Grotto — Create two 1/1 blue Faerie Dragon creature tokens with flying. (Leads to: Last Light Inn)

all_parts.name: Fuck you, Baltimore! If you're dumb enough to buy a new car this weekend, you're a big enough schmuck to come to Big Bill Hell's Cars! Bad deals! Cars that break down! Thieves! If you think you're going to find a bargain at Big Bill's, you can kiss my ass! It's our belief that you're such a stupid motherfucker, you'll fall for this bullshit—guaranteed! If you find a better deal, shove it up your ugly ass! You heard us right! Shove it up your ugly ass! Bring your trade! Bring your title! Bring your wife! We'll fuck her! That's right! We'll fuck your wife! Because at Big Bill Hell, you're fucked six ways from Sunday! Take a hike—to Big Bill Hell's—Home of Challenge Pissing! That's right! Challenge Pissing! How does it work? If you can piss six feet in the air straight up and not get wet, you get no down payment! Don't wait! Don't delay! Don't fuck with us, or we'll rip your nuts off! Only at Big Bill Hell's, the only dealer that tells you to fuck off! Hurry up, asshole! This event ends the minute after you write us a cheque—and it better not bounce or you're a dead motherfucker! Go to hell—Big Bill Hell's Cars! Baltimore's filthiest, and exclusive home of the meanest sons-of-bitches in the state of Maryland—guaranteed!

data.hcid: The Ring // The Ring Tempts You1
data.name: The Ring // The Ring Tempts You

card_faces.name: The Ring
card_faces.oracle_text:
Your Ring-bearer is legendary and can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.
Whenever your Ring-bearer attacks, draw a card, then discard a card.
Whenever your Ring-bearer becomes blocked by a creature, that creature's controller sacrifices it at end of combat.
Whenever your Ring-bearer deals combat damage to a player, each opponent loses 3 life.

card_faces.name: The Ring Tempts You
card_faces.oracle_text:
As the Ring tempts you, you get an emblem named The Ring if you don't have one. Then your emblem gains its next ability and you choose a creature you control to become or remain your Ring-bearer.
• The Ring can tempt you even if you don't control a creature.
• The Ring gains its abilities in order from top to bottom. Once it gains an ability, it has that ability for the rest of the game.
• Each time the Ring tempts you, you must choose a creature if you control one.
• Each player can have only one emblem named The Ring and only one Ring-bearer at a time.

card_faces.name: Undercity
card_faces.oracle_text:
You can't enter this dungeon unless you "venture into Undercity."
Secret Entrance — Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Leads to: Forge, Lost Well)
Forge — Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. (Leads to: Trap!, Arena)
Lost Well — Scry 2. (Leads to: Arena, Stash)
Trap! — Target player loses 5 life. (Leads to: Archives)
Arena — Goad target creature. (Leads to: Archives, Catacombs)
Stash — Create a Treasure token. (Leads to: Catacombs)
Archives — Draw a card. (Leads to: Throne of the Dead Three)
Catacombs — Create a 4/1 black Skeleton creature token with menace. (Leads to: Throne of the Dead Three)
Throne of the Dead Three — Reveal the top ten cards of your library. Put a creature card from among them onto the battlefield with three +1/+1 counters on it. It gains hexproof until your next turn. Then shuffle.

card_faces.name: The Initiative
card_faces.oracle_text: Whenever one or more creatures a player controls deal combat damage to you, that player takes the initiative.\nWhenever you take the initiative and at the beginning of your upkeep, venture into Undercity. (If you're in a dungeon, advance to the next room. If you're not, enter Undercity. You can take the initiative even if you already have it.)

data.name: Dungeon of the Mad Mage
data.oracle_text:
Yawning Portal — You gain 1 life. (Leads to: Dungeon Level)
Dungeon Level — Scry 1. (Leads to: Goblin Bazaar, Twisted Caverns)
Goblin Bazaar — Create a Treasure token. (Leads to: Lost Level)
Twisted Caverns — Target creature can't attack until your next turn. (Leads to: Lost Level)
Lost Level — Scry 2. (Leads to: Runestone Caverns, Muiral's Graveyard)
Runestone Caverns — Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them. (Leads to: Deep Mines)
Muiral's Graveyard — Create two 1/1 black Skeleton creature tokens. (Leads to: Deep Mines)
Deep Mines — Scry 3. (Leads to: Mad Wizard's Lair)
Mad Wizard's Lair — Draw three cards and reveal them. You may cast one of them without paying its mana cost.

data.name: Lost Mine of Phandelver
data.oracle_text:
Cave Entrance — Scry 1. (Leads to: Goblin Lair, Mine Tunnels)
Goblin Lair — Create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token. (Leads to: Storeroom, Dark Pool)
Mine Tunnels — Create a Treasure token. (Leads to: Dark Pool, Fungi Cavern)
Storeroom — Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. (Leads to: Temple of Dumathoin)
Dark Pool — Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (Leads to: Temple of Dumathoin)
Fungi Cavern — Target creature gets -4/-0 until your next turn. (Leads to: Temple of Dumathoin)
Temple of Dumathoin — Draw a card.

data.name: Tomb of Annihilation
data.oracle_text:
Trapped Entry — Each player loses 1 life. (Leads to: Veils of Fear, Oubliette)
Veils of Fear — Each player loses 2 life unless they discard a card. (Leads to: Sandfall Cell)
Sandfall Cell — Each player loses 2 life unless they sacrifice a creature, artifact, or land of their choice. (Leads to: Cradle of the Death God)
Oubliette — Discard a card and sacrifice a creature, an artifact, and a land. (Leads to: Cradle of the Death God)
Cradle of the Death God — Create The Atropal, a legendary 4/4 black God Horror creature token with deathtouch.
